candidate_lesson: Trades that must be RECONSTRUCTED from the fills ledger (no log_forex_decision() call) are structurally blind and should be treated as UNRELIABLE — 6 of 7 such trades lost (WR=14%, avg R=-0.011).
testable_rule: if decision.why_this_trade.startswith('RECONSTRUCTED') or decision.signal_layers_active == []: flag UNRELIABLE, block auto-execution, require pipeline re-entry with populated commitment_score before sizing.
reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
